segments.text: This woman found out she was secretly filmed by a man when someone sent her a video with a million views and hundreds of disgusting sexual comments. Now, as
disturbing as that sounds, this is not an isolated [music] event. You know,
there are entire social media accounts that are dedicated to this kind of content. That's why we wanted to cover this to tell you that if [music] this happens to you, there are hacks you can
use to protect yourself. First is legally under the bharti and naya sanit.
This could fall under voyism stalking and insulting a woman's modesty. It can also attack section 66E of the IT act,
especially if you're framed in a private setting. So, if this happens, file an FIR with your local police or cybercell with whatever evidence you have.
Secondly, [music] we recently stumbled upon this app called Nearby Glasses that basically warns you if there's an active [music] pair of smart glasses near you by scanning for Bluetooth signals from
specific devices. [music] So, at least you can be more vigilant. But to be honest, all these apps can only do so much. Now, [music] three years ago, the IT ministry consulted on stricter
regulations for new age privacy invasive [music] devices like these. But still,
nothing concrete has come out. We definitely need updated laws before this tech reaches more bad actors. Until then, share the story with every single
